content: We can reframe Self-Refine's generic single-perspective iterative refinement framework as a base that can be expanded by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refine pipeline that outperforms both original approaches. This new pipeline retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision, while leveraging perspective inconsistency to catch blind spots single-perspective feedback misses.
